returns._0: Number of eligible verifiers (power > 0, not banned)

params.engagementId: Engagement ID where fraud was detected
params.offenders: Array of juror addresses that voted incorrectly

params.panelSize: Total number of jurors to select (N)
params.useWeighting: Whether to use VPT amounts as weights in selection

hasVerifierPower(address).notice: Check if address has verifier power for community

reportFraud(uint256,address[],string).notice: Handle fraud detection by initiating governance ban process

selectJurors(uint256,uint256,uint256,boo.notice: Select M jurors from N available verifiers for an engagement using VPT eligibility
